career_objective: Build AI-powered software products that solve real business problems through automation, intelligent systems, and modern software engineering.
summary: Sachin Tadkale is an Full Stack Developer focused on building intelligent software, AI assistants, and scalable full-stack applications. He enjoys solving real-world problems through automation and modern software architecture while continuously exploring Large Language Models, Agentic AI, FastAPI, and production-ready AI systems.

projects.name: Vyaro
projects.description: Vyaro is an agricultural marketplace ecosystem developed to connect farmers directly with buyers through web and Android applications.
projects.problem: Farmers lacked direct digital channels to sell produce, while buyers struggled to find reliable local suppliers.
projects.solution: A full-stack marketplace built using Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, React, and Android with a shared backend serving multiple client applications.
projects.architecture: Spring Boot REST API + PostgreSQL + React Web + Native Android App
key_features: Shared backend for web and mobile

projects.name: Sara AI
projects.description: Sara AI is a personal AI assistant focused on automating real-world workflows through tool calling and intelligent automation.
projects.problem: General-purpose chatbots cannot directly automate productivity workflows or integrate deeply with external tools.
projects.solution: An AI assistant built using FastAPI, Python, structured outputs, and tool calling to execute external workflows reliably.

projects.name: Worklyn
projects.description: Worklyn is a productivity workspace that combines messaging, video calling, and task management into one platform.
projects.problem: Teams often rely on multiple disconnected collaboration tools.
projects.solution: A centralized collaboration platform using Node.js, WebSockets, WebRTC, PostgreSQL, and React.
projects.architecture: React + Node.js + Express + Socket.io + PostgreSQL + WebRTC

experience.summary: Working on frontend development, feature implementation, and user experience improvements.
responsibilities: Implement new features and fix production bugs.

experience.summary: Worked on full-stack web applications and REST API development.
responsibilities: Built inventory and hospital management systems.

services.title: AI Solutions Development
services.description: Design and build AI-powered applications using Large Language Models and modern AI frameworks.

services.title: Full Stack Development
services.description: Develop scalable web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies.

services.title: Business Process Automation
services.description: Automate repetitive workflows using AI, APIs, and intelligent software solutions.

achievements: Built multiple full-stack applications from idea to deployment.
